# Texture Assets

## `paper_vintage_01.svg`

- Type: project-authored SVG tile
- Purpose: base paper texture asset for the `Old Paper` map overlay
- Source: created inside this repository for runtime tiling on the map canvas
- License: same as the repository unless stated otherwise elsewhere

This asset was visually informed by public documentation and texture references, but it does not embed or redistribute any external scan.

References consulted during implementation:

- MDN `createPattern`: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/CanvasRenderingContext2D/createPattern
- MDN `CanvasPattern.setTransform`: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/CanvasPattern/setTransform
- D3 geo shapes and graticules: https://d3js.org/d3-geo/shape
- Texture look reference only: https://everytexture.com/everytexture-com-stock-paper-texture-00078/
